title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: Apify MCP Connectors enhance Hermes Agent performance by 10x according to the video. The connectors provide universal MCP integration capabilities for improved agent functionality. David Ondrej demonstrates practical use of these connectors for AI workflow automation.
writeup: David Ondrej demonstrates how Apify MCP Connectors integrate with the Hermes Agent, which the video claims increases agent performance by 10x. The connectors provide universal Model Context Protocol integration, extending agent functionality for AI workflow automation. The walkthrough covers practical use of these connectors, touching on multi-agent systems and browser automation.
